result.summary: Detected a spelling error in the sub-navigation bar and standard horizontal scrolling truncation on game cards.

issues.description: The category tab label is misspelled as 'Jacpots' instead of 'Jackpots'.
issues.suggestion: Correct the spelling of the navigation label to 'Jackpots'.

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge of the screen are partially cut off without a clear indicator for horizontal scrolling.
issues.suggestion: Ensure a subtle visual cue or scrollbar indicators exist to show more games are available to the right.
